string 2:
This is my fifth energy drink. So many people are on leave,
I can't afford to collapse!
{next}Are you all right?
{next}Is it that busy?
{next}Just don't die on us!

I feel like I could collapse any minute. I know I shouldn't
try to tough it out...

The Anomalous Affairs Division is always understaffed. And I
have a bad habit of not asking for help...

Actually, I've had a fever the past few days. I know it's
bad to try to hide my weaknesses.

Captain Kuremi said that, too. Actually... would you mind
listening to my complaints?

You don't know how happy I'd be if you were
extra personnel in a public safety uniform...
Am I seeing things...? Are you really here to help?
{next}I'm not a hallucination.
{next}So you have something I can help with?
{next}I felt like cosplaying.
So I'm not imagining things from lack of sleep...?

Of course. You seem to know more about phase electron
lifeforms than we do.

Did you get that uniform from an illegal auction? Diversion
of government-issued equipment is a serious offense...
Does this mean you're responding to my complaints?

It's important to ask for help sometimes, right? In that
case, I'll accept your help.
{next}Sure thing.
{end}Don't take too much advantage of me...

You seem to know more about phase electron lifeforms
than we do, so it's really helpful.
O-Of course not! If you change your mind, just let me know.

I'd like you to help us investigate the underground here.
There are still some areas that could be fluctuating.

You're finally here. I bet you haven't rested at all... Hey,
what's with the uniform?
{next}I came here to help.
{next}I'm responding to Asuna's complaints.
{next}Nice to see you, boss.

It's true we're seriously understaffed, but we can't let
just anyone help us.

Wow, that's rare. I've never heard her complain about
anything.
I don't remember having a subordinate like you...

How are you going to report to the higher-ups that you let a
civilian help us?

No need. This was an on-site decision due to lack of
manpower. That should be enough.
I get how you feel, but...

Well, anomalous phenomena won't let up just because we're
short-staffed. Let's go.
Oh, boy... Has the lack of sleep gotten to her?

Should we come back again later? I'd hate to lose this
opportunity, though...

Hate to admit it, but we need your help with this space. No reinforcements
are expected... Okay. We'll stay here and wait for your return.

Welcome back! Thanks to you, I was able to get some rest
while waiting!

Don't forget that people may be in danger at this very
moment.
Here comes a tough one. Let's go.

You sure about this? You'll be responsible if anything
happens to a civilian...

This person knows more about phase electron lifeforms
than we do. I trust my gut on this.
Are you all right? Are you hurt anywhere?
{next}I'm fine.
{next}What about you?
{next}Piece of cake.
I'm so glad you came to help.
Both Shota and I are fine.
I feel bad asking for your help.

I'll let it go this time, but if you pretend to be one of us
again, I'm taking you in.

I'm the one who asked for help. You don't have to say it
like that...
{next}I sense hostility.
{next}I sense your pride as a public safety officer.
{next}I'll just do it without asking.
I won't deny that.
It's called "professionalism."
Just be careful you don't run into us, then.

More about phase electron lifeforms than we do?
Think about what that means.

I heard governments are sending agents to dig up info on
phase electron lifeforms.
Are you saying this person is one of them?

Hey, think of this as a parting gift. Don't stick your nose
in our business anymore.
{next}I'm sure we'll meet again.
{next}You know who to call if you need anything.
{next}You should be grateful.

Don't make me laugh... Next time we see you, we're
strangers.
Were you even listening? Cheeky little...

Well, aren't you the patronizing one? But I suppose you did
actually do us a favor...

I know how Shota comes across... but I'm sure he really is
grateful.
He's just bad at showing it... Not that I can talk in that regard.
...Anyway, I'll be seeing you.
